_meta.notes: All slots and attributes verified directly from NPM package source. Do not re-derive for known components — use this registry.
_meta.note_on_feeds: feed-* entries are duplicated in registry-feeds.json (which has the complete set of feed variants). Prefer registry-feeds.json when adding new feed usage.

card-standard.label: Card
card-standard.description: General content card. Supports image, eyebrow, headline, text, date, and actions. Renders as a block (stacked) or list (horizontal) depending on data-display.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Card title. Use an anchor tag to make the whole card clickable.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Card image. Use an anchor wrapping an img for linked images.

slots.name: date
slots.description: Publication or event date. Use a time element.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Layout variant. Omit for default block/stacked layout.

notes.list: Horizontal list layout — image right, text left
notes.promo: Dark overlay promo style with background image

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-visual-image-aligned
attrs.description: Force consistent aspect ratio on images across a group of cards. Set to "true".

card.description: Standard card with aligned image (consistent image height across grid)

card-standard.example:
Research

Article Title

Brief description of the article content.

March 1, 2025
card-standard.notes: Use data-visual-image-aligned="true" for card grids so all images crop to the same height.

card-overlay.label: Card Overlay
card-overlay.description: Card with text overlaid on a background image. Without an image, renders as a text-only dark card. Supports a custom CTA icon link.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Background image. Without this the card renders as a text-only variant.

slots.name: cta-icon
slots.description: Single anchor tag used as an icon CTA link.

attrs.name: type
attrs.description: Required to render a background image. Without type="image" the image slot is ignored and the card renders as text-only. Always set type="image" when providing an image slot.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-loading-priority
attrs.description: Image loading priority. Defaults to lazy.

classes.name: size-large
classes.description: Applied directly on umd-element-card-overlay to increase minimum height. Sets minHeight to 320px on mobile and 560px on tablet+. Use whenever the card is featured prominently — e.g., as the sticky column in umd-element-sticky-columns. Example: <umd-element-card-overlay type="image" class="size-large">
classes.usage: feature card in sticky column or hero-style card contexts

overlay card.description: Card with image background and text overlay — always include type="image" when using an image slot

overlay card large.description: Overlay card with taller min-height for featured/sticky column use. Add class="size-large" to the element.

card-overlay.notes: When used as a feature card — e.g., in the sticky column slot of umd-element-sticky-columns — always add class="size-large" to the element. CRITICAL — cdn.js never injects the UA custom styles for host elements into the document, so the size-large min-height rule must be defined manually in the page <style> block. Additionally, min-height alone does not work — the shadow DOM inner container uses height: 100% which only cascades when the host has an explicit height. Use height: 320px (mobile) and height: 560px (tablet+) on the host element. Without .size-large + the manual CSS rule, the card uses the internal default of 360px (mobile) and 424px (tablet).
card-overlay.example:
Research

Article Title

Brief description.

Learn More

card-icon.label: Card Icon
card-icon.description: Compact card designed for icon + headline + text combinations. Useful for feature lists, service grids, and program overviews.

slots.name: text
slots.example: Description of this feature or service.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

card-icon.example:
Research Excellence

Supporting description of this area.

card-video.label: Card Video
card-video.description: Video card that embeds a video element with play controls. Supports full or short height variants.

slots.name: video
slots.description: A video element. Required — component will log an error without it.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Shorter card height variant.

attrs.name: data-autoplay
attrs.description: Auto-play the video on load.

card-event.label: Event Card
card-event.description: Specialized card for displaying events with date, time, and location. Renders a date sign and event meta (time, location) automatically from ISO date slots. Supports block (default), feature, promo/overlay, and list display variants.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Event title. Use an anchor tag to make the card clickable.

slots.name: start-date-iso
slots.description: Event start date/time as a <time> element. The datetime attribute must be an ISO 8601 string — this drives the date sign and event meta display.

slots.name: end-date-iso
slots.description: Event end date/time as a <time> element with ISO 8601 datetime. Used to compute duration shown in event meta.

slots.name: text
slots.example: Join us for presentations from leading researchers across campus.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Event image. Required for the promo (overlay) variant to render the background.

slots.name: eyebrow
slots.description: Category or type label. Displayed as a ribbon in the feature variant.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Layout variant. Omit for default block layout.

notes.feature: Large date sign, eyebrow ribbon — use for highlighted/featured events
notes.promo: Text overlaid on background image (overlay card style) — requires image slot
notes.list: Horizontal list layout with large date sign

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

attrs.name: data-visual-transparent
attrs.description: Transparent background. Use when placing cards over a colored section background.

attrs.name: data-visual-time
attrs.description: Show time in the event meta display.

event card.description: Default block event card with date sign and event meta

event overlay card.description: Event card with text overlaid on background image — requires image slot

event card feature.description: Featured event card with large date sign and eyebrow ribbon

event card list.description: Horizontal list event card with large date sign

event card dark.description: Default block event card, dark theme

event card list dark.description: Horizontal list event card, dark theme

card-event.example:
Annual Research Symposium

Join us for presentations from leading researchers.

April 15, 2025 at 9:00 AM April 15, 2025 at 5:00 PM

Stamp Student Union
card-event.notes: start-date-iso is required — the component will render an empty div if it is missing. Slot names are start-date-iso and end-date-iso (NOT date-start-iso / date-end-iso). Use a <time> element with a valid ISO 8601 datetime attribute (e.g. 2025-04-15T09:00:00). The date sign and event meta (time, location) are generated automatically from the date slots. For the promo (overlay) variant, always include an image — without one the overlay has no background.

feed-news-grid.label: News Grid Feed
feed-news-grid.description: Dynamic grid of news articles fetched from the Maryland Today feed. Self-populating — no content slots. Renders cards in a responsive grid (1–4 columns). Supports overlay card style and lazy loading. Requires data-token.

attrs.name: data-token
attrs.description: API authentication token. The component will not render without this.

attrs.name: data-filter-group-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter news. Omit to show all news.

attrs.name: data-layout-column-count
attrs.description: Number of columns in the grid (1–4). Defaults to 3.

attrs.name: data-layout-row-count
attrs.description: Number of rows to show initially (1–2). Defaults to 1.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Use overlay card style (text over image background).

attrs.name: data-lazy-load
attrs.description: Enable a 'load more' button to fetch additional articles beyond the initial count.

attrs.name: data-visual-transparent
attrs.description: Transparent card backgrounds. Use when placing the feed over a colored section.

attrs.name: data-entry-remove-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated entry IDs to exclude from the feed.

feed-news-grid.critical_css: umd-feed-news requires display:block and container-type:inline-size on the host element. Add to critical CSS: umd-feed-news:not(:defined) { content-visibility:hidden; contain-intrinsic-size:auto 10vh; min-height:10vh; } umd-feed-news { display:block; container-type:inline-size; }

news grid overlay.description: News grid with overlay card style

feed-news-grid.notes: No content slots — articles are fetched and rendered automatically from the Maryland Today API. data-token is required. Use data-filter-group-ids to scope to a specific category (the source page uses '10476' for Maryland Promise stories). Wrapping in umd-layout-space-horizontal-larger is recommended for consistent gutters.

feed-news-list.label: News List Feed
feed-news-list.description: Dynamic stacked list of news articles fetched from the Maryland Today feed. Self-populating — no content slots. Renders articles as horizontal list cards optimized for vertical scanning. Requires data-token.

attrs.name: data-token
attrs.description: API authentication token. The component will not render without this.

attrs.name: data-filter-group-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter news.

attrs.name: data-layout-row-count
attrs.description: Number of articles to show initially (1–10). Defaults to 5.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

attrs.name: data-lazy-load
attrs.description: Enable a 'load more' button to fetch additional articles.

attrs.name: data-entry-remove-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated entry IDs to exclude from the feed.

feed-news-list.critical_css: umd-feed-news-list requires display:block and container-type:inline-size on the host element. Add to critical CSS.
feed-news-list.notes: No content slots — articles fetched automatically. Pairs well with umd-element-sticky-columns as the static column content alongside a section intro in the sticky column.

feed-news-featured.label: Featured News Feed
feed-news-featured.description: Dynamic featured news layout: first article renders as a large overlay card with sticky positioning; next two articles appear as a supporting block card grid. Additional articles load via lazy load. No content slots. Requires data-token.

attrs.name: data-token
attrs.description: API authentication token. The component will not render without this.

attrs.name: data-filter-group-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter news.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

attrs.name: data-layout-reverse
attrs.description: Reverse the layout — overlay card moves to the right, supporting grid to the left.

attrs.name: data-top-position
attrs.description: Override sticky position in pixels (e.g. '100'). Set to match the height of a sticky nav header.

attrs.name: data-layout-position
attrs.description: Observed attribute — dynamically updates the sticky card's top position. Same purpose as data-top-position but reactive to DOM changes.

attrs.name: data-lazy-load
attrs.description: Enable a 'load more' button to fetch additional articles beyond the initial 3.

attrs.name: data-visual-transparent
attrs.description: Transparent card backgrounds on supporting block cards.

attrs.name: data-entry-remove-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated entry IDs to exclude from the feed.

feed-news-featured.critical_css: umd-feed-news-featured requires display:block and container-type:inline-size on the host element. Add to critical CSS.

news featured.description: Featured news layout — large overlay card + supporting grid

news featured reversed.description: Featured news layout, reversed — overlay card on right

feed-news-featured.notes: Renders 3 articles on initial load: 1 overlay (featured) + 2 block cards. Falls back to standard 2-column grid if fewer than 2 articles are returned. Set data-top-position to match your sticky nav height so the overlay card sticks below the nav. No content slots — articles are fetched automatically from the Maryland Today API.

feed-events-list.label: Events List Feed
feed-events-list.description: Dynamic vertical list of events fetched from the UMD events API. Self-populating — no content slots. Optimized for sidebar and sticky column layouts. Requires a data-token to render.

attrs.name: data-token
attrs.description: API authentication token. The component will not render without this.

attrs.name: data-filter-group-ids
attrs.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter events. Omit to show all events.

attrs.name: data-layout-row-count
attrs.description: Number of event rows to show initially. Accepts 1–10, defaults to 5.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

attrs.name: data-lazy-load
attrs.description: Enable a 'load more' button to fetch additional events beyond the initial row count.

feed-events-list.notes: No content slots — events are fetched and rendered automatically from the API. data-token is required; the component renders an empty div and logs an error without it. Use data-filter-group-ids to scope to a specific category (e.g. arts, athletics). Pairs naturally with umd-element-sticky-columns as the static column content.

event-slider.label: Event Slider
event-slider.description: Horizontal scrollable slider for displaying a collection of events. Headline and CTA are built into the component via slots — no separate section-intro needed. Each event item inside slot='event-list' must be a umd-element-events-date custom element (not a plain div, not umd-element-event). Supports dark theme.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Section headline displayed above the slider.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: CTA link displayed alongside the headline. Use a bare <a> element (not umd-element-call-to-action).

slots.name: event-list
slots.description: Container <div> holding event items. Each item should be a umd-element-events-date component — the slider copies the slot innerHTML and the browser upgrades these components inside the shadow DOM. Use umd-element-events-date with slots: headline (h3 with a), start-date-iso (time element). The slider renders date sign + headline for each item.
slots.example:
Annual Research Symposium

April 15, 2025

Career Fair

April 20, 2025

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme — dark background with light text.

attrs.name: resize
attrs.description: Set to 'true' to trigger recalculation of date element sizes after dynamic content updates or container resize.

event slider.description: Horizontal scrollable event slider with headline and CTA

event-slider.notes: The event-list slot is required. The component copies the innerHTML of the slot div into shadow DOM (extract-and-append — standard slot projection does NOT apply). Event items must be umd-element-events-date custom elements; plain divs produce no date sign. Actions slot expects a bare <a> tag, NOT umd-element-call-to-action. Include umd-element-slider-events in critical CSS Group 2 (container-type: inline-size).
event-slider.example:
Upcoming Events

View All Events

Annual Research Symposium

April 15, 2025

Career Fair

April 20, 2025

events-date.label: Event Date Lockup
events-date.description: Renders a date sign block (month abbreviation + day number) alongside an event headline. Used as the child item type inside umd-element-slider-events. Not a standalone page component — always used within an event slider's event-list slot.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Event title. Use an h3 with an anchor link.

slots.name: start-date-iso
slots.description: Start date. Use a <time> element with a datetime attribute in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS). The component reads the datetime value to build the date sign. Slot name is start-date-iso — NOT date-start-iso.

slots.name: end-date-iso
slots.description: End date for multi-day events. Same format as start-date-iso. Slot name is end-date-iso — NOT date-end-iso.

event date.description: Single event item with date sign and headline

events-date.notes: Slot names are start-date-iso and end-date-iso (not date-start-iso / date-end-iso). Wrong slot names fail silently — no date sign is rendered. Must be a direct child of the event-list slot div inside umd-element-slider-events.
events-date.example:
Annual Research Symposium

April 15, 2026

article.label: Article Card
article.description: Article-specific card with eyebrow, headline, text, date, image, and actions. Similar to card-standard but tuned for news/article listings.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: List layout (horizontal). Omit for default block layout.

attrs.name: data-visual
attrs.description: Visual treatment.

article.notes: Functionally close to card-standard. Prefer article for news/editorial contexts and card-standard for generic content cards.

event-time.label: Event Time Card
event-time.description: Two-column event card emphasizing start/end time, location, and optional image. Use for time-forward event listings (lectures, workshops with specific windows).

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark theme styling.

call-to-action.label: Call-to-Action Button
call-to-action.description: Wraps a child <a> or <button> and applies UMD CTA styling. Use for all primary/secondary/outline CTAs — do NOT style raw buttons.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Button style. Omit for default secondary-ish look.

attrs.name: data-visual-size
attrs.description: Large size variant.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Theme variant. On dark sections use data-theme="dark".

call-to-action.notes: Clones and enhances the child link/button. Always nest a real anchor or button inside — don't rely on the component as the interactive element.
